name: @broberg/i18n
description: Headless locale engine: a framework-free createI18n() with dot-path t() (fallback chain + {var} interpolation), a bilingual() helper for {da,en} content objects, localStorage persistence + navigator.language detection, an html[lang] sync, a pub/sub with no context provider, and a globalThis-keyed singleton guard (pnpm-hoist safe). The LanguageSwitcher UI is copy-owned per stack.
